excerpt: A further examination, however, of the locations where we see them and of the almost constant intensities that we see almost force us to the conclusions that they must somehow be protons from the outer Van Allen belt region here,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
